name: Nate Custer
bio: Having worked as a Systems Architect, QA Automation Lead, Application Developer, Developer of tools for QA teams, Nate now works as a Principal Technologist for TTC Global. In his 7 years with TTC Global he has worked on engagements for many Fortune 500 organizations – including Apple, Meta, Fiserv, State Street, Janus Henderson, and On Semiconductor. Nate is passionate about helping teams deliver quality software. When he is not at a computer, you’ll most likely find him reading a book, sipping scotch, or talking with his friends about Manchester United.
